_provenance: Regression-snapshot baselines produced by rapidmeta-prognostic-engine-v1.js on the 5 real fixtures in tests/prognostic_fixtures/. Generated 2026-05-11 via the engine itself (Paule-Mandel tau^2 + IV-RE pool); these are *engine self-consistency* baselines, not external metafor::rma() parity numbers. To upgrade to metafor parity, re-run rma(yi, vi, method="PM") in R/WebR and overwrite this file. Engine versioning is at the top of the engine source file; any change to the PM/REML estimator or the Wald CI construction must trigger a baseline regeneration.

bnp_hf_doust2005.method: log-scale random-effects pool (Paule-Mandel/REML); HKSJ with Cochrane v6.5 floor; Q-profile tau^2 CI; PI df=k-1

kim1_dkd_coca2017.method: log-scale random-effects pool (Paule-Mandel/REML); HKSJ with Cochrane v6.5 floor; Q-profile tau^2 CI; PI df=k-1

hscrp_chd_erfc2010.method: log-scale random-effects pool (Paule-Mandel/REML); HKSJ with Cochrane v6.5 floor; Q-profile tau^2 CI; PI df=k-1

hstn_dose_response_jia2019.method: log-scale random-effects pool (Paule-Mandel/REML); HKSJ with Cochrane v6.5 floor; Q-profile tau^2 CI; PI df=k-1
